text: As the doors close behind me, I feel a peculiar sense of anticipation—cut off from the outside world, I am ushered into this vibrant space dedicated to R+D. The surreal glow of light and the colorful displays trigger a philosophical curiosity—what is the purpose of my presence here? The text on the screen speaks of confusion as a rhythm, and I find resonance in this thought. There is comfort in the uncertainty and an odd thrill in not knowing whether I am here to observe, or to be observed. I feel suspended in possibility, eager to see what discoveries will follow.
